title: Ripples of the Past: Made in Heaven Addon
description: An Addon that adds Made in Heaven to Ripples of the Past.
body:
![Made in Heaven Title Photo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1176b69e16e18f5b915d3ee49a010182b673e9d7.png)
# A Ripples of the Past addon that adds Made in Heaven.
A Minecraft mod that adds a Made in Heaven to [Ripples of the Past](https://modrinth.com/mod/ripples-of-the-past/versions) obtainable through Stand Arrow 

## Abilities:
### Left Click Hotbar:
- Punch (Shift Variation: Heavy Punch)
- Barrage (Shift Variation: Heavy Punch)
- Throat Slice => Send MiH and its user forward and slice at an opponent.
### Right Click Hotbar:
- Block
- Light Speed Dash => Dash working like Teleport Action
- Time System
### Passives:
- Can see in TimeStop
- Can short a TimeStop
